code.new_contract: For actual_li and actual_li_panel routes, the probe can now feed real TorchTitan sparse-MLA boundary q/dO plus materialized per-head probs and scaled grad_logits into the selected-limit TileLang dKV producer.

s512_correctness.read: Correctness is checked against a PyTorch final-dKV oracle using the real boundary probabilities and scaled grad-logits after BF16 packing into the TileLang input contract.

s4096_timing.read: The timed TileLang producer excludes boundary materialization. The materialized per-head prob and grad-logit tensors are included as diagnostic input-contract evidence, not as fused sparse-MLA backward.

comparison.read: Real sparse-MLA boundary probabilities do not regress the selected-limit TileLang dKV producer. This de-risks the promoted candidate: the earlier 6.9 ms result was not a random-weight artifact.

next_work: Move per-head probability and grad-logit recompute into or adjacent to the TileLang producer instead of materializing two 512 MiB S4096 tensors.
Connect the output final dKV to the compressor/LI backward consumer and keep the no-selected-state saved-tensor contract.
Rerun the full sparse-MLA/LI backward boundary once the materialized-prob bridge is replaced by fused production.
